rulings.Case Title: BOBBY SISK ET AL VS. EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint (Pertaining To Case No. Cgc-16-551933)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 19, 2017 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANTs EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. and EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC.'s Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint (Pertaining To Case No. CGC-16-551933) DENIED, without prejudice for Plaintiff to move to amend the complaint according to proof later if necessary and proper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOBBY SISK ET AL VS. EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION / Christian Church Homes Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 19, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN CHURCH HOMES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and show that Plaintiff is not entitled to rescission of all the contracts subject to the first cause of action. While this cause of action is directed to at least 4 separate agreements (FAC, 30, 34(f) and (h)), the moving papers and facts in the Separate Statement only address one of them. Additionally, even if the burden was shifted there is a triable issue of fact as to the proper vote on the agreements. Late-filed reply is stricken. = (501/REQ)

Parties to appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. = (501/REQ)
